name: Baked Stuffed Vidalia Onions
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Varietal grape juice or white wine
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the onions and slice off the tops, leaving about a 1/2-inch shell. Reserve the center of the onions.
2. Place the shells in a baking dish and cover with plastic wrap. Microwave on high for 5 minutes (or place shells in a steamer basket and steam for 6 minutes after water boils).
3. Measure 1/2 cup of reserved onions and finely chop them. In a small skillet, heat 2 tablespoons of water and sauté the chopped onion until soft.
4. In a bowl, stir together TVP®, hot water, and seasonings.
5. Combine the TVP® mixture with the softened onion and bread crumbs.
6. Place the hollowed-out shells in a microwave-safe pan and spoon in the filling.
7. Scatter remaining onion scraps (coarsely cut) around the stuffed onions.
8. Pour vegetable stock and juice or wine into the pan.
9. Cover tightly and microwave on high for 6 minutes, or bake uncovered at 375 degrees for 30 to 35 minutes.
10. Remove from heat and let stand for 5 minutes.
